zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mainwaring II於1360年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾梅爾時，他的父親Roger de Mainwaring III25歲，母親Christian De Berthes25歲。他於1389年與Mary Margery Davenport在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1451年在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾馬爾斯頓聖 包利斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mainwaring II于1360年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾梅爾时，他的父亲Roger de Mainwaring III25岁，母亲Christian De Berthes25岁。他于1389年与Mary Margery Davenport在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1451年在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾馬爾斯頓聖 包利斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mainwaring II was born in 1360, in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Mainwaring III, was 25 and his mother, Christian De Berthes, was 25. He married Mary Margery Davenport in 1389, in St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1451, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mainwaring II est né en 1360, à Meering, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Mainwaring III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Christian De Berthes, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mary Margery Davenport en 1389, à St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1451, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mainwaring II 1360 in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Mainwaring III 25 und seine Mutter Christian De Berthes 25. Er hat 1389 in St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Mary Margery Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1451 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mainwaring IIが1360年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアメエリングで生まれた時，父Roger de Mainwaring IIIは25歳，母Christian De Berthesは25歳であった。1389年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバースト ラウレンセ'ス チャーチでMary Margery Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1451年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマーストンスト プアウル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint James' and Saint Paul's Church, Ma: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마스턴 스트 폴'스 c후르치
ko.Saint Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Ch: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버 스트 로렌스'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Mainwaring II(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 메링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Mainwaring III(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian De Berthes(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버 스트 로렌스'스 c후르치에서 Mary Margery Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마스턴 스트 폴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mainwaring II nasceu em 1360, em Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Mainwaring III, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Christian De Berthes, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Margery Davenport em 1389, em St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1451, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mainwaring II родился в 1360 г. в местности миринг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Mainwaring III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian De Berthes, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Margery Davenport в 1389 г. в местности ст ларенсе'с чурч, овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1451 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности ст поул'с чурч, марстон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
